zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard II Windsor of Stanwell於1295年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Windsor I20歲，母親Julian Stapleton16歲。他於1323年與Juliana de Molyneux在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年4月3日在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard II Windsor of Stanwell于1295年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Windsor I20岁，母亲Julian Stapleton16岁。他于1323年与Juliana de Molyneux在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年4月3日在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard II Windsor of Stanwell was born in 1295, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Windsor I, was 20 and his mother, Julian Stapleton, was 16. He married Juliana de Molyneux in 1323, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 April 1367, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard II Windsor of Stanwell est né en 1295, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Windsor I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Julian Stapleton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Molyneux en 1323, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard II Windsor of Stanwell 1295 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Windsor I 20 und seine Mutter Julian Stapleton 16. Er hat 1323 in London, England Juliana de Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. April 1367 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard II Windsor of Stanwell è nato il nel 1295 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Windsor I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Julian Stapleton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Juliana de Molyneux nel 1323, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard II Windsor of Stanwellが1295年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Windsor Iは20歳，母Julian Stapletonは16歳であった。1323年にイギリスロンドンでJuliana de Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年4月3日に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard II Windsor of Stanwell(이)가 1295년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Windsor I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian Stapleton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1323년 영국 런던에서 Juliana de Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 4월 3일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard II Windsor of Stanwell nasceu em 1295, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Windsor I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Julian Stapleton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Molyneux em 1323, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard II Windsor of Stanwell родился в 1295 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Windsor I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian Stapleton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Molyneux в 1323 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 апреля 1367 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard II Windsor of Stanwell nació en 1295, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Windsor I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Julian Stapleton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Juliana de Molyneux en 1323, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
